feature.name: Onboarding WOW Experience — Instant Replay Walkthrough + Dashboard Tour
feature.description: Replace the fake SSE demo with a cinematic, personalized walkthrough showing what 60 does with the user's company name. Add a post-onboarding welcome splash + enhanced dashboard tour + animated activation checklist. Zero backend changes — all frontend animation and personalization.

stories.title: Create useTypewriter hook and shared animation variants
acceptance: useTypewriter(text, speed, delay) hook returns { displayText, isComplete } with character-by-character reveal
Shared animation variants exported: staggerContainer, slideUp, fadeIn, shimmerBar, glowPulse, scaleIn
All variants use design system tokens (violet-600 for glow, gray-900/80 for glassmorphism)
Hook handles cleanup on unmount and supports reset trigger

stories.title: Create walkthrough-data.ts — personalized demo data generator
acceptance: getWalkthroughData(companyName, products, industry, userName) returns all 4 acts of personalized content
Meeting card data: fictional prospect 'NovaTech' + 'Sarah Chen, VP Sales' — consistent across all acts
Prep data: attendee intel (3 bullet points), talking points using companyName and product[0]
Post-meeting data: summary with companyName, 3 action items, follow-up email draft personalized with companyName
Fallback values for every field: 'your company', 'your solution', 'your industry'

stories.title: Fix data-tour attribute bugs and add missing targets in AppLayout
acceptance: Fix AppLayout line 972: change backslash to forward slash in dashboard href comparison
Verify all 5 data-tour targets render correctly: dashboard, meetings, copilot, credits, settings
Add data-tour='notification-bell' to NotificationBell.tsx button element
Add data-tour='activation-checklist' to ActivationChecklist.tsx outer Card wrapper

stories.title: Build WalkthroughScene components — Act 1 'Meeting Detected' and Act 2 'Meeting Prep'
acceptance: MeetingDetectedScene: glassmorphic card with calendar icon, meeting title using companyName, 'Sarah Chen, VP Sales at NovaTech', typing status line
MeetingPrepScene: expands to show Attendee Intel (3 bullets staggered), Talking Points using companyName + products, 'Ready 12 hours before' badge with pulse
Both scenes auto-advance after their duration (3s and 4s respectively)
Scenes use slideUp + staggerContainer variants from WOW-001
Design: rounded-xl, bg-gray-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm, border-gray-700/50, violet-600 accents

stories.title: Build WalkthroughScene components — Act 3 'Post-Meeting Magic'
acceptance: PostMeetingScene: 'Meeting Complete' header with duration + recorded badge, then shimmer 'processing' bar (1.5s)
Summary card slides up with personalized text using companyName and product names
Action Items card slides up 400ms later with 3 items (unchecked boxes animate to checked after 1s)
Follow-up Email card slides up 400ms later with subject + body preview + 'not sent' amber badge
Total scene duration: 7 seconds, auto-advances to Act 4

stories.title: Build WalkthroughScene — Act 4 'The Payoff' with typewriter headline
acceptance: PayoffScene: Previous cards compress/fade, headline types out: 'This happens automatically.'
Second line fades in: 'Every meeting. Every follow-up. Every deal — while you focus on closing revenue for {companyName}.'
4-quadrant capability grid fades in: Pipeline (auto-updated), Follow-ups (auto-drafted), Prep (auto-generated), Actions (auto-tracked)
Each quadrant has Lucide icon + label, subtle scale-up on appear
CTA button: 'Enter Your Command Centre' with gradient shimmer animation

stories.title: Build WalkthroughTimeline progress indicator
acceptance: WalkthroughTimeline: horizontal 4-dot progress indicator showing current act
Active dot: violet-500 with glow pulse, completed dots: green-400 with checkmark, pending: gray-600
Labels below dots: 'Prep' | 'Brief' | 'Results' | 'Ready'
Smooth animated transitions between dots using layoutId or spring animation
Compact design: fits in 40px height strip above the scene area

stories.title: Rewrite InstantReplayPanel — orchestrate walkthrough scenes with auto-advance
acceptance: Replace SSE pipeline with walkthrough state machine: offer → walkthrough → complete
Read companyName/products/industry from onboardingV2Store (enrichment || manualData || fallback)
Walkthrough auto-advances through 4 acts with AnimatePresence mode='wait' transitions
User can click 'Enter Your Command Centre' on Act 4 — calls completeOnboarding() then onComplete()
Skip link available at every state — calls onSkip()

stories.title: Build WelcomeSplash overlay — personalized full-screen welcome
acceptance: WelcomeSplash: fixed full-viewport overlay with bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-lg
Staggered text: 'Welcome to your Command Centre, {firstName}' then '{companyName}'s AI sales teammate is ready.'
Auto-dismisses after 3 seconds OR on click/tap anywhere
Smooth fade-out transition (opacity 1 → 0, duration 500ms)
Reads firstName from profile via useAuth or useProfile hook, companyName from org data

stories.title: Rewrite ProductTour — fix theme, add personalization, 8 steps
acceptance: Fix tooltip theme: violet-600 primary (not blue-600), gray-900/95 bg with backdrop-blur, violet border glow
8 tour steps with personalized copy: dashboard, meetings, copilot, credits, settings, activation-checklist, notification-bell, final centered
Step content references companyName and creditBalance where relevant
Final step (no target, centered): 'You're All Set!' with summary + actionable next step
Tour width 360px, border-radius 1rem, matching design system glassmorphism

stories.title: Integrate WelcomeSplash into dashboard flow — splash then tour sequence
acceptance: When user lands on dashboard after onboarding: WelcomeSplash shows first (3s), then ProductTour starts
Sequence controlled by shared state: splash completion triggers tour start
If user already completed tour (localStorage check), neither splash nor tour shows
Works correctly on page refresh: reads sixty_onboarding_completed_at timestamp from localStorage

stories.title: Remove instant-replay edge function call — walkthrough is fully client-side
acceptance: InstantReplayPanel no longer imports supabase or getSupabaseAuthToken
No fetch() call to instant-replay edge function
Remove SSE parsing logic, abort controller, and related state (steps, errorMessage)
Verify NotetakerConnectionStep.tsx still passes connectedId and callbacks correctly
Panel works entirely offline — no network dependency

stories.title: Enhance ActivationChecklist — staggered entrance animations and progress bar animation
acceptance: Checklist items stagger in on first render with framer-motion staggerChildren: 0.1
Completed items get checkmark animation: scale 0 → 1.2 → 1 with spring bounce
Progress bar fills smoothly with transition duration 800ms ease-out
Each item has an info tooltip on hover explaining WHY it matters (using Tooltip component)
Design matches existing emerald gradient but adds motion on first render

stories.title: Add milestone celebrations to ActivationChecklist
acceptance: At 50% completion (4/7 items): toast.success with confetti emoji 'Halfway there! 60 is getting smarter.'
At 100% completion (7/7 items): celebratory card transformation — emerald glow pulse + '60 is fully activated!' header
Celebrations trigger only once per user (localStorage: activation_celebration_{milestone}_{userId})
Celebration state does not block any UI interactions

stories.title: End-to-end flow test and timing polish
acceptance: Full flow: Notetaker step → click Run → 4-act walkthrough → Enter Command Centre → Welcome Splash → 8-step Tour → Dashboard with animated checklist
Walkthrough total duration: 16-20 seconds (not too fast, not too slow)
No flash of unstyled content between walkthrough completion and dashboard load
Edge cases tested: no enrichment data (fallback copy works), user skips at each state, page refresh mid-tour
All animations smooth at 60fps — no jank on transitions
